query: What Con Edison commercial customer service class pays the highest demand charge in Manhattan based on OpenEI tariffs data?
final_answer:
Based on OpenEI's Utility Rate Database for Consolidated Edison Co-NY Inc commercial tariffs in Manhattan, the service class with the **highest demand charge** is:

**SC-8 – Multiple Dwellings Redistribution Low Tension Service – Zone I [NYC]**
**$68.54/kW** (and the same rate applies to Zone J)

This is composed of the base demand rate of **$53.85/kW** plus an adjustment of **$14.69/kW** for the NYC delivery zone, applied in the higher-demand season above the first 10 kW.

Source: OpenEI Utility Rate Database (IURDB), Consolidated Edison Co-NY Inc commercial tariffs retrieved for Manhattan, NY; specifically tariff records `67b66529...`, `67b6667e...`, etc.

steps.content:
Based on OpenEI's Utility Rate Database for Consolidated Edison Co-NY Inc commercial tariffs in Manhattan, the service class with the **highest demand charge** is:

**SC-8 – Multiple Dwellings Redistribution Low Tension Service – Zone I [NYC]**
**$68.54/kW** (and the same rate applies to Zone J)

This is composed of the base demand rate of **$53.85/kW** plus an adjustment of **$14.69/kW** for the NYC delivery zone, applied in the higher-demand season above the first 10 kW.

Source: OpenEI Utility Rate Database (IURDB), Consolidated Edison Co-NY Inc commercial tariffs retrieved for Manhattan, NY; specifically tariff records `67b66529...`, `67b6667e...`, etc.
